pending.body:
finding_summary: `tests/unit/bv_adapter_test.rs:107-117` and `tests/unit/bv_adapter_test.rs:227-271` model the "no next bead" / blocked-graph cases with ad hoc payloads (`{"next":null,"reason":"nothing ready"}` and `{"ready":[],"blocked":[...]}`), but the actual `bv --robot-next` no-recommendation contract used elsewhere in this repo is the message-only payload handled in `src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:664-692` and emitted by fixtures in `src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:1059-1063` and `src/cli/run.rs:4645-4649`. These tests therefore pass without exercising the real empty-graph path, so they do not actually protect the graceful "no actionable items" behavior this bead is supposed to cover.
affected_files:
- tests/unit/bv_adapter_test.rs
remediation_hint: Replace the invented payloads with assertions against the real message-only `bv --robot-next` output, or add adapter-facing handling for that contract and test that behavior directly.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 2 -> Plan and Implement
